affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司“C”小队

backstory.original: This copper, draconic gentleman claims to know more than one hundred different dragons. Chromatic, metallic -- just tons and tons of dragons -- I'm hoping we can leverage some of these connections in our dealings. None of the dragons I've contacted have gotten back to me, but they're probably just very busy right now. This is one of the busiest times for dragons... or so I've been told by my new best friend, Donaar Blit'zen.
backstory.display: 这位赤铜龙裔绅士声称他认识一百多种不同的龙。彩色的、金属的--各种各样的龙--我希望能在我们的交易中利用这些关系。我联系的龙都没有回复我，但他们可能只是现在很忙。这是龙最忙的时候之一......至少我这位新的好朋友多纳尔·布里赞是这么告诉我的。

description.original: Donaar targets a random enemy, casting a random Command on them and doing a small amount of psychic damage
description.display: 多纳尔随机指定一名敌人，向其发出一道随机命令，然后造成少量精神伤害。

longDescription.original: Donaar casts a random command. His commands target one enemy and deal a small amount of psychic damage in addition to their effect (see the passive Command ability for details).
longDescription.display: 多纳尔发出一道随机命令。他的命令会以一名敌人为目标，在原有效果（详见被动“命令”技能）之外额外对其造成少量精神伤害。

description.original: Donaar attacks the nearest enemies with his comically oversized sword, then vomits acid.
description.display: 多纳尔用他的夸张巨剑攻击距离最近的敌人，然后吐出强酸。

longDescription.original: Donaar attacks the nearest enemies with his comically oversized sword, then vomits acid in a puddle which deals damage to enemies who walk through it.
longDescription.display: 多纳尔用他的夸张巨剑攻击距离最近的敌人，然后吐出一滩强酸，对走过的敌人造成伤害。

description.original: Donaar heals the Champion in the formation with the lowest health percentage over 10 seconds.
description.display: 多纳尔对阵型中生命值百分比最低的勇士进行治疗，持续 10 秒。

description.original: Donaar increases the damage of Champions in his column and the columns behind him.
description.display: 多纳尔提高同列和后列的勇士伤害。

description.desc: Donaar attacks with the Command spell. The Command he chooses with each attack is randomly picked from the following options:^Hold: the target is stunned for $amount___2 seconds^Duel: the target berserks, moving $amount___3% faster and attacking twice as often, but dealing 90% less damage^Cower: the target now has a 50% chance to miss on any attack it makes and takes $amount___4% extra damage^Droppit: the target drops $amount___5% more gold when it dies^All Commands last until the target dies, unless otherwise noted.

多纳尔以“命令”法术进行攻击。他每次攻击所选择的命令从以下选项中随机选择：^定身：目标被眩晕 $amount___2 秒^决斗：目标陷入发狂状态，移动速度提高 $amount___3%，攻击频率翻倍，但造成的伤害减少 90%^畏缩：目标的所有攻击现在有 50% 的几率不会命中，并且额外受到 $amount___4% 的伤害^掉宝：目标死亡时掉落的金币增加 $amount___5%^所有命令会持续到目标死亡，除非另有说明。

Every second, Donaar heals the champion who has lost the most health for $amount health over 10 seconds (1 immediate tick + 10 more ticks each second thereafter). If he targets a champion who already has this effect, it refreshes the duration to 10 seconds, but doesn't immediately tick again.
每秒钟，多纳尔为失去了最多生命值的勇士施加治疗，在 10 秒内为其恢复 $amount 点生命值（立即结算 1 次，随后再结算 10 次，每秒 1 次）。如果他以一位已经有此效果的勇士为目标，效果的持续时间将刷新为 10 秒，但不会再次立即结算。

tipText.original: Donaar heals the most damaged members of your formation, regardless of where they are in relation to him.
tipText.display: 多纳尔会治疗阵型中受伤最重的队员，无论对方与他的距离。

description.desc: Donaar increases the damage of Champions in the same column and the column(s) behind him by $amount%.
多纳尔会使与他同一列或处于他身后各列中的勇士伤害提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Donaar buffs Champions in the same column and columns behind him. Place him near the front of your formation to gain the biggest benefit.
tipText.display: 多纳尔为同一列和身后各列中的勇士提供增益。将他放置在阵型的前线附近，以获得最大加成。

description.desc: When Donaar is in the formation, most abilities that involve stacks are granted $amount extra stack.
当多纳尔在阵型中时，大多数具有堆叠层数机制的技能会额外获得 $amount 层。
Increases the effect of Lead By Example by $amount% for each Chaotic Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位混乱勇士，“以身作则”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Sometimes the best path forward isn't a straight line.
specializationDescription.display: 有时候最佳的前进线路并不是直线。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Lead By Example by $amount% for each Dragonborn or Tiefling Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位龙裔或提夫林勇士，“以身作则”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 龙裔或提夫林勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Donaar's tail is an obvious sign of his noble heritage.
specializationDescription.display: 多纳尔的尾巴是他高贵血统的明显标志。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Lead By Example by $amount% for each C-Team or Acquisitions Incorporated affiliated Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位“C”小队或艾奎兹玄有限责任公司勇士，“以身作则”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: “C”小队或艾奎兹玄有限责任公司勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Donaar invests in his closest friends.
specializationDescription.display: 多纳尔会投资他最亲密的朋友。

description.desc: Enemies affected by one of Donaar's Command Word spells take an additional $amount% damage while they are affected by it.
受多纳尔任一“命令词”法术影响的敌人在受影响期间会额外受到 $amount% 的伤害。
Donaar casts Command: Hold twice as often with his base attack, and increases the duration of the stun by 2 seconds.
多纳尔进行基本攻击时，他施放“命令：定身”的频率提高为两倍，并且眩晕的持续时间增加 2 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Donaar prefers to command his enemies to hold their movement.
specializationDescription.display: 多纳尔更喜欢命令他的敌人静止不动。

description.desc: Donaar casts Command: Duel twice as often with his base attack, and the speed of enemies Donaar berserks is increased by 100%.
多纳尔进行基本攻击时，他施放“命令：决斗”的频率提高为两倍，并且被多纳尔导致发狂的敌人速度提高 100%。

specializationDescription.original: Donaar chooses to enrage his foes into a berserk frenzy by commanding them to duel.
specializationDescription.display: 多纳尔选择命令他的敌人决斗来激怒他们，使他们发狂。

description.desc: Donaar casts Command: Cower twice as often with his base attack, and the bonus damage taken by cowering targets is increased by 100%.
多纳尔进行基本攻击时，他施放“命令：畏缩”的频率提高为两倍，并且畏缩的目标所受的额外伤害增加 100%。

specializationDescription.original: Donaar tends to command his enemies to cower in fear.
specializationDescription.display: 多纳尔倾向于命令他的敌人在恐惧中畏缩。

description.desc: Donaar casts Command: Droppit twice as often with his base attack, and the extra gold dropped is increased by 100%.
多纳尔进行基本攻击时，他施放“命令：掉宝”的频率提高为两倍，并且额外掉落的金币增加 100%。

specializationDescription.original: Donaar orders his foes to "droppit", an unorthodox way to get around Command's single word restriction.
specializationDescription.display: 多纳尔命令他的敌人“掉宝”，用这种非常规的方式来巧妙绕过命令词只能是两个字的限制。

description.original: I've decided I will stay back and heal.
description.display: 我决定了，我要留在后方提供治疗。

description.original: A decision has been made, now let's execute it!
description.display: 既然决策已经下了，我们就来执行吧！

description.original: Everyone get behind me -- I'm gonna vomit!
description.display: 所有人都跟在我后面--我要吐了！

description.original: Maybe I just like having gold on me?
description.display: 也许我只是喜欢身上带着金币？

description.original: If I just keep yelling 'I'm lucky!' it will happen. One day.
description.display: 如果我不断喊“我很幸运！”，那就会成真。总有一天会。

description.original: What do you mean: give up the gold? There was nothing there...
description.display: 你这话什么意思：放弃金币？那里什么都没有……

description.original: You all just need to coooool out.
description.display: 你们都需要冷静一点。

description.original: We'll make it through if you just stop dying, alright?
description.display: 只要你别再死，我们会度过难关的，明白吗？

description.original: This time, I'll do a flip before I swing the sword!
description.display: 这一次，我要在挥剑之前翻个跟头！

description.original: Careful not to step in the acid vomit, okay?
description.display: 小心点，不要站在酸性呕吐里，好吗？

description.original: This time I'm gonna do a flip! Then you try!
description.display: 这次我要做个鹞子翻身！然后你来试试！

description.original: I've been practicing my glare. Check it out. Scary, right?
description.display: 我一直有在练习用凶狠的眼神看人。你看，很吓人，对吧？

description.original: I'm just standing here... menacingly!
description.display: 我只是站在这里……就是气势有点吓人！

description.original: Hey, who hired the new interns?
description.display: 嘿，这些新的实习生是谁雇的？

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: It's an honor for you to work with me. Let's get started!
description.display: 能和我合作是你的荣幸。我们开始吧！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Wait, what's my breath weapon now?!
description.display: 等等，我的吐息武器是啥来着？！

effects.description: Donaar also counts as an Aasimar

description.original: We all just need to sit down and talk this out, alright?
description.display: 我们大家得坐下来好好谈谈，好吗？

effects.description: Donaar's Command now also affects enemies in a small area around the target; they are all affected by the same random command.

description.original: Hey! Look over there! A distraction!
description.display: 喂！快看那边！会让人分心的东西！

effects.description: Enemies that attempt to attack this Champion will instead attack a different Champion, if possible.

description.original: It comes with a year's supply of sharpening scales
description.display: 这剑都可以当作磨刀石来用一整年了。

description.original: It's a family hair loom. Yeah, I know what I said, it's like a machine that makes rope from hair.
description.display: 这是个家传之宝。是的，你没听错，这简直就是个将一丝丝头发卷成绳索的机器。

description.original: Oooooooooooh Yeeeeeeaaaaaaaahhhhh!
description.display: 欧咿呀耶！

description.original: Everybody coooooooool out!
description.display: 大家冷静一一一点！

description.original: Tooth decay is no joke. Gotta respect your gums!
description.display: 蛀牙可不是闹着玩的。大家要多珍惜自己的牙床！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: When you vomit acid as much as I do, it's important to keep your teeth cleaned!
description.display: 你要是跟我一样总是咳酸液的话，那就更要保持口腔卫生了！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: If you brush really fast, the jewels make the room look like a party!
description.display: 要是迅速地来回刷牙，牙刷上的宝石就会把房间闪耀得像在开派对一样！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: When I really want to get my point across, Percival can double as a mic! Ooh Yeaah!
description.display: 当我真的想要说服他人时，还可以把珀西瓦尔当作麦克风使用。欧耶！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Anything is better than these trail rations!
description.display: 不管是什么食物都要比远行口粮来得美味！

description.original: I know I have it here. . . somewhere.
description.display: 我记得是把它收藏在......哪里来着。

description.original: If you join us for happy hour, we have Tarrasque Kabobs!
description.display: 我们今天的优惠时间所准备的菜肴是泰拉斯奎烤肉串！

description.original: I'm John, Paul, and George, but you guys are my Ringos. I need my Ringos!
description.display: 我是约翰、保罗、乔治，而你们则是我的林戈。我需要你们林戈！

description.original: You never forget your first coin flip.
description.display: 每个人都会记得自己第一次抛硬币的经历。

description.original: Chronaar may have chewed on it a bit.
description.display: 可能是被科罗娜咬坏了。

name.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司硬币

description.original: Boulder beats knife. Knife beats parchment. Parchment beats boulder. Tail beats everything.
description.display: 石头胜刀子，刀子胜纸张，纸张胜石头，硬币赢全部。

description.original: Remember? Tail beats everything.
description.display: 还记得我说的话不？尾巴强于一切。

description.original: Did you know that I know a ton of dragons? They're very busy right now.
description.display: 其实我是认识很多很多巨龙的。只不过他们现在都忙得很。

description.original: Dibs. I found it.
description.display: 咦。让我找到了。

description.original: This egg is more important than the rest of the group.
description.display: 此蛋比团里任何人都来得重要。

description.original: She lives in Skolla now. She's sort of my daughter? It's a long story.
description.display: 她现在都定居在斯科拉了。从某种意义上来说她算是我的女儿吧？唉，说来话长呀。

description.original: If you sit in the corner and put the cape over your head, you can take a nap and Rosie won't even know!
description.display: 只要坐到角落里将斗篷披到头上，哪怕是打呼噜也不会招罗茜发现。

description.original: It even covers my tail! If I do this cool curl like so. Sorry. Did I hit you?
description.display: 这斗篷连我的尾巴都能掩盖得住！我要是这样摇晃尾巴的话。哎呀。不好意思，打到你了是吗？

description.original: Did you know that oceans are the forests of the sea? True story.
description.display: 我告诉你呀其实海洋就是大海中的森林。真的不骗你。

description.original: This was my brother's cape, I brought it with me when I left Jinaar. I don't want to talk about it.
description.display: 这是我兄弟的披肩，当初我是戴着它离开吉纳尔的。以前的事我不想多提了。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Dragonborn Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CHA score of 15 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: This copper, draconic gentleman claims to know more than one hundred different dragons. Chromatic, metallic -- just tons and tons of dragons -- I'm hoping we can leverage some of these connections in our dealings. None of the dragons I've contacted have gotten back to me, but they're probably just very busy right now. This is one of the busiest times for dragons... or so I've been told by my new best friend, Donaar Blit'zen.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Donaar uses his Command attack to temporarily alter enemy behavior. He also heals and buffs allies behind him.

event_upgrades.name: Aura of Vitality
event_upgrades.description: Donaar heals the Champion in the formation with the lowest health percentage over 10 seconds.

event_upgrades.name: Lead By Example
event_upgrades.description: Donaar increases the damage of Champions in his column and the columns behind him.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 这位赤铜龙裔绅士声称他认识一百多种不同的龙。彩色的、金属的--各种各样的龙--我希望能在我们的交易中利用这些关系。我联系的龙都没有回复我，但他们可能只是现在很忙。这是龙最忙的时候之一......至少我这位新的好朋友多纳尔·布里赞是这么告诉我的。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 多纳尔使用命令攻击，能够暂时改变敌人的行为。他也能为身后的友军提供治疗和增益。

event_upgrades.name: 活力灵光
event_upgrades.description: 多纳尔对阵型中生命值百分比最低的勇士进行治疗，持续 10 秒。

event_upgrades.name: 以身作则
event_upgrades.description: 多纳尔提高同列和后列的勇士伤害。

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 既然决策已经下了，我们就来执行吧！

display.name: 医师
display.description: 你们都需要冷静一点。

original.name: Combat Healer
original.description: We'll make it through if you just stop dying, alright?

display.name: 战斗治疗师
display.description: 只要你别再死，我们会度过难关的，明白吗？

original.name: Dragonborn Leadership
original.description: Careful not to step in the acid vomit, okay?

display.name: 龙裔领袖
display.description: 小心点，不要站在酸性呕吐里，好吗？

original.name: Watch This!
original.description: This time I'm gonna do a flip! Then you try!

display.name: 看好了！
display.description: 这次我要做个鹞子翻身！然后你来试试！

original.name: Wound Master
original.description: This time, I'll do a flip before I swing the sword!

display.name: 疗伤大师
display.description: 这一次，我要在挥剑之前翻个跟头！

original.name: Frugal
original.description: Maybe I just like having gold on me?

display.name: 节俭
display.description: 也许我只是喜欢身上带着金币？

original.name: Lucky
original.description: If I just keep yelling 'I'm lucky!' it will happen. One day.

display.name: 幸运
display.description: 如果我不断喊“我很幸运！”，那就会成真。总有一天会。

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: Everyone get behind me -- I'm gonna vomit!

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 所有人都跟在我后面--我要吐了！

original.name: Aasimar Glitch
original.description: Wait, what's my breath weapon now?!

effects.description: Donaar also counts as an Aasimar

display.name: 神裔变异
display.description: 等等，我的吐息武器是啥来着？！

effects.description: 多纳尔也算作神裔

original.name: Fortune's Favor
original.description: What do you mean: give up the gold? There was nothing there...

display.name: 幸运眷顾
display.description: 你这话什么意思：放弃金币？那里什么都没有……

original.name: Frightful Presence
original.description: I've been practicing my glare. Check it out. Scary, right?

display.name: 气势凶猛
display.description: 我一直有在练习用凶狠的眼神看人。你看，很吓人，对吧？

original.name: Terrifying Aura
original.description: I'm just standing here... menacingly!

display.name: 吓人的气场
display.description: 我只是站在这里……就是气势有点吓人！

original.name: Job Opportunity
original.description: Hey, who hired the new interns?

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 工作机会
display.description: 嘿，这些新的实习生是谁雇的？

effects.description: 使多纳尔的第一组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Decisive Alliance
original.description: It's an honor for you to work with me. Let's get started!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 关键同盟
display.description: 能和我合作是你的荣幸。我们开始吧！

effects.description: 使多纳尔的第一组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Everybody Coooooool Out!
original.description: We all just need to sit down and talk this out, alright?

effects.description: Donaar's Command now also affects enemies in a small area around the target; they are all affected by the same random command.

display.name: 大家都冷静！
display.description: 我们大家得坐下来好好谈谈，好吗？

effects.description: 多纳尔的命令现在也会影响目标周围一小块区域内的敌人；他们全都受同样的随机命令影响。

original.name: Misdirection
original.description: Hey! Look over there! A distraction!

effects.description: Enemies that attempt to attack this Champion will instead attack a different Champion, if possible.

display.name: 误导
display.description: 喂！快看那边！会让人分心的东西！

effects.description: 试图攻击这名勇士的敌人会转为攻击另一名勇士（如有）。

original.name: Realistic Greatsword
original.description: It comes with a year's supply of sharpening scales

display.name: 务实的巨剑
display.description: 这剑都可以当作磨刀石来用一整年了。

original.name: Serrated Greatsword
original.description: It's a family hair loom. Yeah, I know what I said, it's like a machine that makes rope from hair.

display.name: 锯齿巨剑
display.description: 这是个家传之宝。是的，你没听错，这简直就是个将一丝丝头发卷成绳索的机器。

original.name: Toothbrush
original.description: Oooooooooooh Yeeeeeeaaaaaaaahhhhh!

display.name: 牙刷
display.description: 欧咿呀耶！

original.name: Twothbrush
original.description: Everybody coooooooool out!

display.name: 锯齿刷
display.description: 大家冷静一一一点！

original.name: Royal Toothbrush
original.description: Tooth decay is no joke. Gotta respect your gums!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 皇家牙刷
display.description: 蛀牙可不是闹着玩的。大家要多珍惜自己的牙床！

effects.description: 使多纳尔的第一组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Acid-Cleaning Toothbrush
original.description: When you vomit acid as much as I do, it's important to keep your teeth cleaned!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 酸液洗嗽牙刷
display.description: 你要是跟我一样总是咳酸液的话，那就更要保持口腔卫生了！

effects.description: 使多纳尔的第一组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Bejeweled Toothbrush
original.description: If you brush really fast, the jewels make the room look like a party!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 镶嵌宝石的牙刷
display.description: 要是迅速地来回刷牙，牙刷上的宝石就会把房间闪耀得像在开派对一样！

effects.description: 使多纳尔的第一组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Percival
original.description: When I really want to get my point across, Percival can double as a mic! Ooh Yeaah!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Donaar's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 珀西瓦尔
display.description: 当我真的想要说服他人时，还可以把珀西瓦尔当作麦克风使用。欧耶！

effects.description: 使多纳尔的第一组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Stained Menu
original.description: Anything is better than these trail rations!

display.name: 沾污的菜单
display.description: 不管是什么食物都要比远行口粮来得美味！

original.name: Wrinkled Menu
original.description: I know I have it here. . . somewhere.

display.name: 皱巴巴的菜单
display.description: 我记得是把它收藏在......哪里来着。

original.name: Well-Designed Menu
original.description: If you join us for happy hour, we have Tarrasque Kabobs!

display.name: 精美的菜单
display.description: 我们今天的优惠时间所准备的菜肴是泰拉斯奎烤肉串！

original.name: Yum-Yum Hut Menu
original.description: I'm John, Paul, and George, but you guys are my Ringos. I need my Ringos!

display.name: 美味店菜单
display.description: 我是约翰、保罗、乔治，而你们则是我的林戈。我需要你们林戈！

original.name: Worn Coin
original.description: You never forget your first coin flip.

display.name: 陈旧的硬币
display.description: 每个人都会记得自己第一次抛硬币的经历。

original.name: Talisman of the Gold Variety
original.description: Chronaar may have chewed on it a bit.

display.name: 金品护符
display.description: 可能是被科罗娜咬坏了。

original.name: Acquisitions Incorporated Coin
original.description: Boulder beats knife. Knife beats parchment. Parchment beats boulder. Tail beats everything.

display.name: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司硬币
display.description: 石头胜刀子，刀子胜纸张，纸张胜石头，硬币赢全部。

original.name: Decisionist's Coin
original.description: Remember? Tail beats everything.

display.name: 决策者硬币
display.description: 还记得我说的话不？尾巴强于一切。

original.name: Lost Egg
original.description: Did you know that I know a ton of dragons? They're very busy right now.

display.name: 丢失的巨蛋
display.description: 其实我是认识很多很多巨龙的。只不过他们现在都忙得很。

original.name: Dragonborn Egg
original.description: Dibs. I found it.

display.name: 龙裔巨蛋
display.description: 咦。让我找到了。

original.name: Eggy
original.description: This egg is more important than the rest of the group.

display.name: 蛋蛋
display.description: 此蛋比团里任何人都来得重要。

original.name: Chronaar
original.description: She lives in Skolla now. She's sort of my daughter? It's a long story.

display.name: 科罗娜
display.description: 她现在都定居在斯科拉了。从某种意义上来说她算是我的女儿吧？唉，说来话长呀。

original.name: Barely Torn Cloak
original.description: If you sit in the corner and put the cape over your head, you can take a nap and Rosie won't even know!

display.name: 相当新的斗篷
display.description: 只要坐到角落里将斗篷披到头上，哪怕是打呼噜也不会招罗茜发现。

original.name: Adventurous Cloak
original.description: It even covers my tail! If I do this cool curl like so. Sorry. Did I hit you?

display.name: 冒险斗篷
display.description: 这斗篷连我的尾巴都能掩盖得住！我要是这样摇晃尾巴的话。哎呀。不好意思，打到你了是吗？

original.name: Regal Cloak
original.description: Did you know that oceans are the forests of the sea? True story.

display.name: 宫廷斗篷
display.description: 我告诉你呀其实海洋就是大海中的森林。真的不骗你。

original.name: Nase's Cape
original.description: This was my brother's cape, I brought it with me when I left Jinaar. I don't want to talk about it.

display.name: 纳塞的披肩
display.description: 这是我兄弟的披肩，当初我是戴着它离开吉纳尔的。以前的事我不想多提了。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位女性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Dragonborn Champions by $(amount)%
使所有龙裔勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有力量大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CHA score of 15 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位魅力大于等于 15 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment
阵型中每有一位善良阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
